hero.title: AI you can operate, not just chat with
hero.subtitle: Route requests, run workflows, and keep costs and outcomes observable — grounded in your company data.

what.title: Build controlled AI workflows for real operations
what.lead: Glamy lets you use popular AI models on your company data in a cost-effective way.

cap1.title: Request Routing
cap1.desc: Control how requests are routed to models or configurations.

cap2.title: Run Configurations
cap2.desc: Run controlled configurations with explicit steps.

cap3.title: Observable Operations
cap3.desc: Track costs, usage, and outcomes across interactions.

model1.title: 1. Set Up — Connect your data and define rules
model1.desc: Connect your company data and set access boundaries and usage rules. AI behavior stays within clear limits from the start.

model2.title: 2. Run — Start controlled interactions
model2.desc: Run interactions based on your configurations. The same requests follow the same rules, predictably.

model3.title: 3. Observe — Monitor costs and outcomes
model3.desc: Track spend and outputs across interactions. Adjust configurations when needed, and keep control.

products.label: Use Cases
products.title: Glamy is not designed as a tool that just talks, but as a role that works within your business.
products.subline: Across sales, operations, and every customer touchpoint, it supports your team, takes responsibility, and moves the work forward.

techstack.headline: An infrastructure designed to be part of everyday operations.

platform.title: Sales Enablement
platform.desc: Real-time support during sales conversations. Use live CRM and product catalog data to help your sales team respond accurately and reduce presales dependency.

client.title: Customer Operations
client.desc: Turn messages into completed requests. Handle reservations and incoming requests from channels like WhatsApp and write them into your systems to reduce manual work.

infrastructure.title: Front Desk & Concierge
infrastructure.desc: Always-on service for guests and customers. Act as a front desk or concierge assistant, handle requests, and open tickets when needed to keep service running smoothly.

observability.title: Internal Assistants
observability.desc: Instant help for internal teams. Answer internal questions, explain procedures, and guide people to the right place to shorten onboarding and adaptation time.

suite.title: New Way of Working
suite.lead: Work is changing, and you don’t have to handle it alone.

storefront_web.title: Increase Human Capacity
storefront_web.desc: Glamy boosts the capacity and adaptability of your existing team to achieve more with the same people.

storefront_mobile.title: Large Teams, Lower Cost
storefront_mobile.desc: Handle large workloads sustainably with focused teams while keeping costs under control.

picking_distribution.title: Scale Flexibly
picking_distribution.desc: Grow your business confidently as demand increases, without expanding headcount.

office.title: Don’t Fall Behind
office.desc: Companies adopting new ways of working today are setting the pace for tomorrow.

trust.title: Trust
trust.headline: Customer references will be added once verified and approved.
trust.placeholder: Customer references will be added once verified and approved.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We work with professionals who value clarity, responsibility, and steady progress.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: For inquiries, partnerships, or general questions, email us.

careers.title: Careers
careers.desc: If you value clarity, responsibility, and steady progress, we’d like to hear from you.
